name: Harrisburg Golf Simulator
address: 7011 Allentown Blvd Suite 1 Floor 2, Harrisburg, PA 17112
about: Harrisburg Golf Simulator offers two private Full Swing Simulator rooms for hourly bookings. The venue is equipped with premium Full Swing Simulators featuring high-speed overhead cameras and radar fields for accurate shot tracking. Each room is private and customizable with TV controls, music, and a mini fridge. Pricing is straightforward at $40 per hour with availability 24/7. The Main Room can accommodate small group parties and offers additional sports activities. The facility provides a convenient, realistic golfing experience without travel between shots.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Full Swing Simulators with accurate shot tracking
Private rooms with customizable atmosphere and amenities
No wasted time between shots due to simulator setup
Option to host parties or events with sports activities

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB allowed; mini fridge available in rooms
BYOB allowed; venue has a bar

simulator_hardware.notes: High-speed overhead camera with radar fields in walls, ceiling and floor

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, golfers must bring their own clubs to use the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue allows BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverages) and has a mini fridge available in each room. Food can be brought in for parties.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The simulator setup allows for efficient play without wasted time between shots, but specific 18-hole time is not provided on the website.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly and can accommodate families. Private rooms can be customized for various group needs including children's parties.
